en: I'm a dog, I'm a dog, I'm a dog You ain't nothing but a
ja: お前はただのホットドッグ、ホットドッグ、ホットドッグ。
zhTW: 你就是個熱狗，熱狗，熱狗。
vi: May chi la mot con cho, hot dog, hot dog.

en: Playa getting valeted, running that whole whip Two fingers up, one down with my toes ten
ko: 손가락 두 개 올리고, 발가락은 꽉 쥐고.
ja: 指を2本上げて、つま先を固定して
zhTW: 兩根手指舉起來，腳趾頭夾緊
vi: Hai ngon tay gio len, ngon chan kep chat

en: Fluid out my boots, I'll put a cork in it Love it when you be crying out when I'm corseted
ja: コルセットを着ている時にお前が叫ぶのが好き。あいつはダメだと思う。
zhTW: 我穿束腰時你喊叫的樣子我喜歡。我覺得他不行。
vi: Thich khi ban la het luc toi mac corset. Toi nghi anh ta khong the.

en: I don't think he gon' make it Do not let me start raging I'm losing my patience This ain't staying in Vegas
ko: 날 화나게 하지 마. 인내심을 잃고 있어.
ja: 俺を怒らせるな。忍耐を失ってる
zhTW: 別讓我開始發怒。我正在失去耐心。
vi: Dung de toi bat dau noi dien. Toi dang mat kien nhan.

en: There's more sides to the story, I'ma tell everybody Had your ass in court, side with your arm around me
ko: 이야기에는 더 많은 면이 있어, 모두에게 말할 거야.
ja: コートサイドで腕を回してた
zhTW: 在球場邊你用手臂摟著我
vi: O ben san bong anh om toi

en: Had your ass in first class, with your burnt ass out in Abu Dhabi Could've been what we should've been, but you lost it
ja: ファーストクラスでアブダビまで一緒だった
zhTW: 在頭等艙一起去了阿布達比
vi: O hang nhat di Abu Dhabi cung nhau

en: Bet now you got it from me Find a seat, I ain't playing this hide and seek High school, will you finally peek?
ko: 자리 찾아, 숨바꼭질 안 할 거야.
ja: 席を見つけろ、かくれんぼはしない
zhTW: 找個位子，我不玩捉迷藏
vi: Tim cho ngoi di, toi khong choi tron tim

en: Hound dog, come find a treat I'm a bad bitch, but Dog playa I get it
ja: 高校、ついに頂点。猟犬、おやつを見つけろ。私は悪い女だけど。
zhTW: 高中，我們終於到頂峰。獵犬，來找零食。我是壞女孩，但。
vi: Trung hoc, chung ta cuoi cung len dinh. Cho san, tim phan thuong di. Toi la con nha, nhung.

en: Frog playa I get it I understand, I understand
